title: Invisible: The Chronicles of Benjamin Knight
original_title: Invisible: The Chronicles of Benjamin Knight
overview: When a lab experiment goes wrong, Benjamin Knight is left invisible while his scientist friends trying to find a formula that will restore his visibility to last the rest of his life.
